rulings.Calendar Matter: FILING OF STATUS REPORT
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Calendar Matter: REPORT OF STATUS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 03/17/2026. Issues necessitating continuance: 1) Notice of Hearing (Form DE-120) is required for this proceeding and Box 1 must be checked. (Probate Code Section 12201). All notices must include language about remote appearances. (San Francisco Local Rule 14.1.C.6). 2) If an estate is not ready to close within the statutory time set forth in Probate Code Section 12200, the report of status of administration must set forth the status of the estate, including, but not limited to, allegations regarding notice pursuant to Probate Code Section 9202, disclosure of all creditor claims and their dispositions, requests for special notice, and any assignments or powers of attorney that may affect distribution (San Francisco Local Rule 14.35.J.1). 3) The filing of a report of status of administration shall be deemed to include a petition requesting additional time for estate administration. For the Court to make an order, the report and petition must include a prayer specifying the relief sought (San Francisco Local Rule 14.35.J.2).4) No proposed order has been received or lodged with the court (San Francisco Local Rule 14.7.A). Please address the above issues and deliver courtesy copies of all further fliings to this examiner no later than 03/03/2026 to avoid additional continuance.

rulings.Calendar Matter: OBJECTIONS TO INVENTORY AND APPRAISAL
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. This objection was filed under sec. 2614, which does not authorize the court to grant the requested relief. This relief listed on the proposed order should not be sought through an objection or an attorney's declaration. A proper petition citing the correct authority must be filed. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Please review LRSF 14.1(C) for more information.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE AMENDED AND RESTATED LYDIAH. VARGAS 2008 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For:Accounting; Copies Of Estate Planning Instruments; Suspension, Removal,And Repla
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: 1. The trust does not identify petitioner as a beneficiary. 2. Specific real property has now been identified, but only real property, and it appears that all property still has not been identified. 3. Various individuals who are trust beneficiaries were not listed in the trust petition and have not been given notice. Remote appearances may be made. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED. Meeting ID: 160 225 4765 Password: 514879 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252, and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above.

Please address the issue above and deliver courtesy copies of all futher filings to this examiner not later than 03/03/2026 to avoid further continuance.
